title: Oreganized Refabricated
description: A fabric port of Oreganized by Team Galena
body:
# This project is no longer maintained as it is now official and can be found on the main oreganized page!
# This is a fabric port of [Galena's mod Oreganized](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized).

I tried to keep it as similar to the original as possible, the only change is that there isn't a _work in progress_ tooltip on the Bushhammer. Have fun :3

Oreganized is a mod focusing on adding new ores and metals to Minecraft. Currently it adds Lead and Silver as base metals and a new alloy known as Electrum.

This mod is designed to be a Vanilla plus mod while also adding unique uses and abilities to its content rather than just meaningless toolsets for a more engaging experience that tries to match the quality of Mojang's own implementations of new content.
